goal: A semantic governance gate for spec files: classify every PR change against a locked project goal and scope, pass additive changes silently, and block unapproved scope changes at merge time via GitHub required status checks
scope_in: merge-time enforcement through a GitHub Action and branch protection
ADDITIVE vs SCOPE_CHANGE classification via an independent Claude API call
role-based scope-change approvals through GitHub's native PR reviews
deterministic protected-path rules for governance config files
PyPI package plus composite GitHub Action distribution
scope_out: web dashboards, separate websites, or any new UI
SaaS billing or a hosted service
defining our own spec format or proposal workflow
embedding or forking Spec Kit / OpenSpec code
